title: Smart label hiding: suppress redundant edge labels
description: Don't render edge labels when they match the default edge type (e.g. 'dependency' on every edge). Only show labels that carry information beyond the edge type.

title: Subgraph clustering: group related nodes in renderers
description: Group structurally similar nodes (e.g. language analyzers) using renderer-native grouping: Mermaid subgraph, draw.io container cells, Excalidraw frames. Reduces cognitive load.

title: Add confidence scoring to relationships
description: Assign confidence percentages to CALLS/IMPORTS/EXTENDS edges based on resolution certainty. Currently binary. Direct AST-resolved calls get ~90%; inferred imports through re-exports get lower scores. Lets downstream consumers filter by reliability threshold. Inspired by GitNexus approach.
close_reason: Implemented: Confidence field on Edge (0.9 imports, 0.85 endpoints, 0.8 infra, 0.7 HTTP calls). ResolvedEdges applies 0.1 penalty with 0.5 floor. Commit e346a99.

title: Add super-node pruning to diagram rendering
description: When scanning large codebases, ubiquitous nodes (logging, error handling, fmt) create noisy diagrams with 80% of edges pointing at the same few targets. Add a PruneThreshold option to render options that filters nodes with fan-in exceeding 50% of source nodes. Start with render-time filtering (Option B). Reference: AI-Knowledge note 'Graph RAG - Fixed Entity Architecture and HyDE for Code.md' and /tmp/steal-items-exploration.md for implementation options.
close_reason: Closed

title: Fix instability metric: always 1.0
description: EdgesTo() finds no edges targeting pkg: nodes because all edges target import: nodes. Metrics must resolve import edges to package IDs before computing fan-in.
close_reason: Fixed: ComputeMetrics now uses graph.ResolvedEdges() to resolve import: targets to real pkg node IDs before computing fan-in/fan-out. Model now correctly shows instability=0.0.

title: TypeScript: detect framework from imports
description: Replace hardcoded express label with import-based detection (express, fastify, koa, etc.)
close_reason: Added frameworkPackages map; detectFramework checks imports (express, fastify, koa, hapi, restify)

title: Add ~/.mcp-context/ session context cache convention
description: Shared state directory convention for warm starts across MCP servers. code-to-arch stores scan state in ~/.mcp-context/code-to-arch/. Includes StateDir() helper in internal/infra/persist.go.
notes: Foundation shipped in persist.go: StateDir('code-to-arch') creates ~/.mcp-context/code-to-arch/, LoadJSON/SaveJSON generics for any MCP server. Convention ready for adoption across portfolio.

title: Detect HTTP client calls with URL extraction in all 3 analyzers
close_reason: Implemented cross-service HTTP call detection in Go, TypeScript, and Python analyzers with shared ParseServiceFromURL helper

title: Load .arch-rules.yaml and check custom validation rules
close_reason: Implemented .arch-rules.yaml loading with no_dependency and require_dependency rule types, wired into arch_validate handler

title: Precomputed process traces
description: Index execution flows (entry point → call chain → terminal) at scan time, store as first-class graph entities in persistent state. Return grouped results from arch_focus/arch_dataflow instead of flat symbol lists. Reduces token cost per query by pre-assembling traces. Same principle as Fixed Entity Architecture: push intelligence into the data structure, not query-time traversal.
close_reason: Implemented: ProcessTrace type + ComputeTraces DFS from endpoints to terminals. Wired into arch_dataflow handler. Commit e346a99.

title: Barycenter ordering: minimize edge crossings within layers
description: Reorder nodes within each topological layer based on average position of connected neighbors. Standard crossing-minimization technique (Sugiyama step 2). Applies to draw.io and Excalidraw renderers.

title: Add incremental scanning with mtime+hash change detection
description: Implement FileState tracking (mtime + content hash) so subsequent arch_scan calls only re-analyze changed files. Persist state to .code-to-arch/state.json. Two-level check: mtime fast-path, hash on mtime change.
notes: Implemented: filestate.go (ScanState, FileEntry, DetectChanges, mtime+hash), persist.go (StateDir, LoadJSON, SaveJSON for ~/.mcp-context/), integrated into ScanWithOptions via opts.State. 12 packages pass, 0 regressions.

title: Add panic recovery to handler wrapper
close_reason: Added defer/recover in register() wrapper. Panics in handlers now return errors instead of crashing the server.

title: Fix cache key including timeout
close_reason: Removed opts.Timeout from cache key in handlers.go

title: Fix SanitizeID collisions
close_reason: SanitizeID uses distinct replacements: / → __, : → ___, . → _

title: Filter test files from analysis
description: Add default skip patterns for test files (*_test.go, *.test.ts, test_*.py) in scanner. Make configurable via ScanOptions.
close_reason: Added defaultTestGlobs with IncludeTests opt-out in ScanOptions

title: Remove unused OpenTelemetry code and dependencies
close_reason: Won't fix: tracing infrastructure is correct and ready for production use. The missing piece is handler span instrumentation, which is additive work.

title: Python: add Django URL pattern detection
description: Detect urlpatterns in urls.py files with path() and re_path() calls
close_reason: Added extractDjangoURLPatterns for path()/re_path() in urls.py files

title: Clean up stale documentation
description: Remove phantom internal/llm/ dir, circuit breaker refs in CLAUDE.md, handle HTTP transport stub in main.go, align analyzer descriptions with reality
close_reason: Removed internal/llm/ dir, circuit breaker refs, HTTP stub. Aligned CLAUDE.md descriptions with actual code capabilities.

title: Research: HyDE pattern for future NL-to-code search
description: If code-to-arch ever adds semantic search (arch_search tool), direct cosine similarity between NL queries and code embeddings fails (~0.09 = noise). HyDE pattern (generate hypothetical code from NL query, embed that, match code-to-code) jumps similarity to 0.30+. Not actionable now; park as reference for if/when embedding-based features are added. Paper: Gao et al. 2022, arxiv.org/abs/2212.10496. Full exploration: /tmp/steal-items-exploration.md
close_reason: Won't do: not worth pursuing.

title: Deduplicate edges in ArchGraph
close_reason: AddEdge now deduplicates by source+target+type, returns bool

title: Update tool descriptions to list all 7 output formats
close_reason: Updated arch_generate description and server Instructions to list all 7 formats including draw.io and Excalidraw.

title: New MCP tool for architecture fitness metrics
close_reason: Implemented arch_metrics tool with coupling, instability, and max dependency depth metrics

title: Go: detect popular framework endpoints
description: Add endpoint detection for gin, chi, echo, fiber alongside stdlib in Go analyzer
close_reason: Added frameworkImports map for gin, chi, echo, fiber, gorilla; endpoints now labeled with framework

title: Fix stdlib detection heuristic
close_reason: isStdlib now handles golang.org/x/* as extended stdlib

title: Fix max_depth metric: always 1
description: BFS adjacency follows pkg→import edges but import nodes have no outgoing edges, stopping at depth 1. Must resolve import targets to pkg IDs for proper chain traversal.
close_reason: Fixed: Replaced BFS (shortest path) with DFS+memoization (longest path) for max_depth. Also uses resolved edges so adjacency traverses pkg→pkg chains instead of stopping at import: nodes.

title: Multi-repo registry
description: Global ~/.mcp-context/code-to-arch/registry.json serving multiple indexed repos from one MCP server instance. Enable cross-repo architecture queries. Currently operates on one codebase at a time. Pattern borrowed from GitNexus ~/.gitnexus/registry.json approach.
close_reason: Implemented: 3 registry tools, repo param on all existing tools, persistent incremental scan state. Commit b485315.

title: Boundary detector: add Python/Rust/Java markers
description: Add pyproject.toml, setup.py, Cargo.toml, pom.xml, build.gradle to boundary detection
close_reason: Added pyproject.toml, setup.py, Cargo.toml, pom.xml, build.gradle to boundary detection

title: Transitive reduction: remove edges implied by longer paths
description: Remove redundant edges from the graph before rendering. If A→B→C exists, the direct A→C edge is implied and should be removed. This is the biggest win for readability — cuts ~10 edges from the self-analysis diagram.
close_reason: Closed

title: Fix Python framework classification
close_reason: detectFramework checks imports before classifying flask vs fastapi
